description: Medical specialist fleet — two ≤0.5B SRD-quantized models totalling ~750M params. Research specialist answers clinical questions from text; imaging specialist describes X-rays, CT slices, and pathology images.

specialists.description: Clinical research assistant — medical literature, drug interactions, ICD codes, SOAP notes. Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct SRD-4 quantized.
Medical imaging analyst — chest X-ray interpretation, CT description, pathology slide commentary. SmolVLM-256M-Instruct SRD-4 quantized.
